subcodes.first_line: Lo, the cockerel proclaimeth: "This is My Day, and I sing praise unto the name of God in the Kingdom of creation, for He hath related me unto Him." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان الدیک یقول هذا یومی و اتغنی باسم الله فی ملکوت الانشاء لانه نسبنی الی
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @symbolism, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
